python3 - <<'PY'
from pathlib import Path
paths = list(Path('/home/ubuntu/.pm2/logs').glob('mbutoms-whatsapp-bridge-out*.log'))
for p in sorted(paths):
    lines = p.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
    print('FILE=' + p.name + ' TOTAL=' + str(len(lines)))
    for ln in lines[-20:]:
        print(ln.encode('ascii','ignore').decode())
    print('---')
PY
